Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to occur after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants where rejection occurs after final approval
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in cases that do not reach Request Payment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to be performed after the last approval step in the variant
Metric: the average of the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' or `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to the total time of the full approval path ending in Payment Handled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the subsequent re-submission (Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE) in looping variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants that include a prior Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by MISSING after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time from Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to the next Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in rework loops
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in domestic declaration cases versus pre-paid travel cost cases, inferred from case attributes
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING measured from the immediately preceding activity in its most frequent variant
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and Payment Handled in variants that eventually complete successfully
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Payment Handled'
